description_long: This is a folding tactical knife featuring a matte black, single-edged blade with a straight spine and a slight drop point tip. The blade has several small circular cutouts near the handle, likely for weight reduction and aesthetic appeal. The handle is ergonomically contoured, combining black and brown materials, with a textured grip for secure handling and a visible metal liner. There is a visible thumb stud for one-handed opening and a pocket clip on one side for convenient carrying. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for everyday carry or outdoor use. The knife appears to be constructed primarily from stainless steel and reinforced polymer.
description: A folding tactical knife with a matte black blade, contoured brown and black handle, and a pocket clip for easy carrying.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black blade, brown and black contoured handle, and visible thumb stud.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the pocket clip visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade, handle texture, and absence of the pocket clip.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, showing the slimness and the folded mechanism.
attribute_blade_type: straight, single-edged, drop point, with cutouts
attribute_handle_design: contoured, black and brown polymer, textured grip, ergonomic, with pocket clip
